title: New 'World Trigger' Anime Reveals Main Cast, Staff, Special Promo
content: The World Trigger Festival 2026 revealed the main cast, staff, and a special promotional video for the new anime series on Sunday. The first episode of the reboot project adapting Daisuke Ashihara 's action sci-fi manga will air under the title Kuro Torigaa Goudatsu-hen ( Black Trigger Capture arc ).
author: MyAnimeList

title: Rascal Does Not Dream of a Dear Friend Film Unveils Mai Sakurajima, Kaede Azusagawa Visuals
content: The staff for Seishun Buta Yarō wa Dear Friend no Yume o Minai ( Rascal Does Not Dream of a Dear Friend ) film, the latest anime of Hajime Kamoshida 's Rascal Does Not Dream ( Seishun Buta Yarō or Aobuta) novel series, presented new "memorial visuals" featuring Mai Sakurajima and Kaede Azusagawa via videos on April 19…
author: ANN

title: Former KAT-TUN Idol Yūichi Nakamaru's Chikyū Daisuki! Kikkun Story Gets Short Anime in July
content: Japanese singer, actor, and former KAT-TUN boy band member Yūichi Nakamaru announced during the Okinawa International Culture Festival on Sunday that his original story Chikyū Daisuki! Kikkun is inspiring a short anime that will start airing every Wednesday within Tokyo MX 's 5-ji ni Muchū! morning program in July.
author: ANN

title: Jujutsu Kaisen Reveals Juju Fes 2026 Main Visual for 5th Anniversary Finale Event
content: JUJUTSU KAISEN has revealed the main visual for Juju Fes 2026 -5th Anniversary-, the two-day event which will conclude the series’ fifth anniversary celebrations. The event will take place on August 29 and 30, 2026 at K-Arena Yokohama in Japan.
author: Anime Corner

title: Crunchyroll Confirms New Isekai Anime Releases for 2026 and Beyond (With Major Returns)
content: Crunchyroll took the stage during a special panel as part of CCXP Mexico, and with it confirmed some of the major anime franchises coming to the streaming services like some huge new (and returning) Isekai anime titles.
author: ComicBook

title: New Visual Revealed for The Disastrous Life of Saiki K. Anime for Its 10th Anniversary
content: A new 10th anniversary visual has been released for The Disastrous Life of Saiki K. anime series. The series received an anime adaptation by J.C. Staff that aired from 2016 to 2018, followed by the 6-episode Netflix-exclusive sequel, Reawakened , in 2019.
author: Anime Corner

title: Prince Loki Appears in One Piece Episode 1160 Preview
content: ONE PIECE revealed the preview for Episode 1160, with the notorious prince Loki of Elbaph finally making his debut. The anime returned after a 3-month break on April 5, with the Elbaph Island finally revealed. Yuichi Nakamura was previously revealed as the voice of Loki.
author: Anime Corner

title: The Fragrant Flower Blooms With Dignity Manga Takes 3-Week Break
content: The official X (formerly Twitter ) account for Saka Mikami 's The Fragrant Flower Blooms With Dignity ( Kaoru Hana wa Rin to Saku ) manga announced on Wednesday the series will take a three-week break due to the author's busy schedule with preparations for the series and other projects.
author: ANN

title: World Trigger Anime's 'Reboot Project' Unveils New Teaser, Returning Cast & Staff
content: The " Reboot Project " for the anime of Daisuke Ashihara 's World Trigger manga presented its character designs in a new teaser video on Sunday. The project also announces its returning main cast and main staff. Morio Hatano is returning as the series director from the third and fourth anime seasons.
author: ANN

title: 5 Years Later, Demon Slayer: Mugen Train Still Surpasses Demon Slayer: Infinity Castle
content: Demon Slayer has been one of the most visually stunning anime experiences since its very first season. Ufotable has consistently gone above and beyond to craft the series with exceptional quality. With each season, the anime has only improved, continuing to surprise fans with the heights it can reach.
author: ComicBook
